name: recovery-codes-reveal
description: One-shot reveal of the plaintext recovery codes. Renders the code grid + copy-all + download-as-txt CTAs. Client-side timer hides the codes after `auto_hide_seconds` seconds of no interaction to reduce shoulder-surfing risk. Renders `Cache-Control: no-store` on the embedding page.

instructions.description: Instruction text shown above the code grid.

auto_hide_seconds.description: After N seconds of no interaction, hide the codes behind a 'show' button. Reduces shoulder-surfing risk if the user forgot the modal open.

actions.label: Download as .txt
actions.body:
Academorix recovery codes

Each code is one-time-use. Save this file somewhere safe.

{{props.data | join:'
'}}

audit_note: This widget only renders — it does NOT fetch the codes from the server. The parent screen fetched the codes; this widget displays them. That separation is critical: the widget can be embedded in multiple screens without duplicating the audit-egress signal.
